items.description: Solana trading bot, an automated Solana sniping bot that trades newly-listed tokens on Raydium AMM v4 and pump.fun bonding curves. Listens to on-chain events in real time, applies configurable safety filters, buys with your chosen quote token (WSOL / USDC), and auto-sells on take-profit / stop-loss.
